title: Packing list — pre-Jordan/Egypt 2023
html:
Packing list — pre-Jordan/Egypt 2023

Source: 2023-07-03 Apple Note. A bare packing list written ~2 months before the Jordan/Egypt trip. Useful as a baseline of what Yahir-at-21 considered the minimum kit for an international trip — to compare against his later, leaner 2024 traveling non negotiables and his distilled philosophy.

TL;DR

  • Tech-heavy load: laptop + charger, iPad + charger, headphones, iPhone charger, Nintendo Switch — Yahir bringing essentially his full home-office to the Jordan/Egypt leg
  • Toiletries explicit: contact case, contact liquid, face cleaning pads, toothbrush, deodorant — the "I have to remember the boring stuff" energy of someone who hasn't yet internalized routine packing
  • No clothes specified beyond underwear — either trusting himself with that part or not finishing the list
  • Glasses + contacts both — visual-aid redundancy, the only redundant item on the list
  • Comparison data point: by 2024 the non negotiables note had compressed to "call mom, call dad" — the pendulum swung from object-list to relationship-list

Pattern observed

The 2023 list is outside-in (what objects do I need?). The 2024 list is inside-out (what people do I need to call?). The maturation from junior-year-Yahir to post-China-Yahir is captured in the delta between these two notes.
